description.zh-Hans: 检测边缘并在像素艺术上绘制描边。使用Sobel梯度进行边缘检测。
description.en: Detects edges and draws outlines on pixel art. Uses Sobel gradient for edge detection.

triggers.zh-Hans: 描边, 轮廓, 边缘线, 精灵描边, 线条效果
triggers.en: outline, contour, edge line, sprite outline, line effect

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 为精灵添加外部描边以增强可辨识度。
exampleUsage.en: Add an external outline to a sprite for better visibility.
